case_title: MCDONALD, PHILIP VS CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEPT. OF SOCIAL SVC

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEPT. OF SOCIAL SVC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $483.00 FILED BY MCDONALD, PHILIP AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEPT. OF SOCIAL SVC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-12-1995 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCDONALD, PHILIP IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEPT. OF SOCIAL SVC DEFENDANT WAIVED PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO FILE A CLAIM AGAINST THE GOVERNMENT ENTITY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
